channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Human Forest hire bike left in busy public footway / footbridge area of the right of way at Penge, East Station at the jct of Linden Grove and Newlands Park., 20th May
item.description:
Human Forest hire bike left in busy public footway / footbridge area of the right of way at Penge, East Station at the jct of Linden Grove and Newlands Park. This is an obstacle when trains discharge people a lighting at the station and a hazard in an emergency as well as for blind / partially sighted persons. See at noon Wed 20/5/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, no number plate trailer, 20th May
item.description:
This trailer constantly gets left around all side roads surrounding this road for a week at a time, takes up 2 spaces. It is unsafe as it has no reflective strips/lights, wires hanging out and no number plate. Nor is it attached to a vehicle and therefore has no tax. Please remove as parking is hard enough! And this has been reported previously but someone else.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Landcroft Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence and gate, 20th May
item.description:
Originally reported that this fence which borders Harvington Sports Grounds and the 3 houses on Overstand close has broken. Report reference: 9385259. These fences belong to the council and are not privately owned, as have been replaced by the council previously. Please can you double check your records. The fence still remains hazardous and the gate to this pathway requires repairing or updating too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overstand Close, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old washing machine/dryer - broken furniture and plastic box, 20th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped this outside my home. We have two small children - worried about danger and hygiene
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Dagmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken lamp standard by West Lodge School, 20th May
item.description:
A constitutent states it was previously reported on FMS, but I can't see a report - even though the pavement has been marked up for action.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Priestlands Park Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vechicle BG09DVK, 20th May
item.description:
This car has been parked on the street westbury road se20 7ql for at least 6 months and never moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 4 Cavendish Close, 20th May
item.description:
Mixed flytip outside no 4 Cavendish Close. Paint buckets and discarded decorations under the window. Desk and pram underneath stairwell.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Flytipped bed bases, 20th May
item.description:
Reports as fixed but still there! On Owenite Street near junction with Federation Rd. Please can they be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Federation Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and recycling left at side, 20th May
item.description:
Overflowing bins and recycling left at side, next to residential premises

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shellness Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shelbury Close sign missing, 20th May
item.description:
Most of Shelbury Close is accessed from Hatherley Road, but some have frontages on Station Road. Lack of signage only adds to the confusion and makes some addresses harder to find.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelbury Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped corrugated panel material, 20th May
item.description:
Dumped corrugated panel material, potentially asbestos, in verge at northern end of Norman Road. Witnessed by surveyors on site 20/05/2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norman Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass and rubbish, 20th May
item.description:
There is rubbish and glass for long time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A microwave dumped in the park, 20th May
item.description:
It's been there a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Aldermans Hill To Broomfield Park Opposite 138 Aldermans Hill, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lansdown Road - sign badly faded, 20th May
item.description:
Perhaps cleaning or repainting would suffice.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdown Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aluminum safety ring has become detached, and is causing the piece to not turn properly, its causing more danger than not currently as fingers can get trapped / lacerated, 20th May
item.description:
Aluminum safety ring has become detached, and is causing the piece to not turn properly, its causing more danger than not currently as fingers can get trapped / lacerated been like it for months and is getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give way road sign necessary, 20th May
item.description:
Necessary give way sign as well as junction on bend ahead sign.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selby Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barbed wire on dog walking path, 20th May
item.description:
There’s a pile of rubbish that has been left for nearly a month now. It’s got barbed wires in it which is dangerous for the dogs that get walked there. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass overgrown, 20th May
item.description:
Grass is overgrown making it impossible to see the dog mess that people have left and impossible to avoid it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side Crescent, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on brick wall in Station Avenue, 20th May
item.description:
Station Avenue is between Jay Jay Barbers and Victorias Beauty. Graffiti is down the end of the avenue. 2 large tags. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Avenue, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike nest in Northlands Road, 20th May
item.description:
Pink tag on front. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
